title: 24 Pieces Gold Birthday Cake Candles,Gold Long BirthdayCandles with Holders,Glitter CakeCandles Tall BirthdayCake Candles with Holder for BirthdayWedding Party Decoration
features: Thin and Long Design:This set includes 24 birthday candles, conveniently packaged in 4 boxes with 6 candles each. The candles stand at 4.3 inches (11 cm) tall, perfect for creating a striking, elegant display on any cake.

Chic and Unique Look:Featuring a sleek and modern design, these candles come with detachable holders and a beautiful metallic finish, adding a refined touch to any celebration. They are easy to insert and stay securely in place, making them a great addition to your cake.
Safe and Premium Quality:Crafted from high-quality wax, these birthday candles burn evenly and smoothly.

Hold Up Well with Stand Base:Each candle is equipped with a practical plastic base that prevents wax drips, keeping your cake clean and mess-free. These candles are a reliable and elegant choice for any cake topper.

Perfect for All Celebrations:These timeless birthday candles are ideal for a variety of occasions, including birthdays, Mother's Day, weddings, bridal showers, baby showers, and more. Their versatility and beautiful design make them an excellent choice for adding a creative touch to any party or event.
